scripts.lint: npm run check:architecture-guardrails --silent && tsc --pretty false -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test: npm run build --silent && tsc --pretty false -p apps/shell/tsconfig.test.json && tsc --pretty false -p apps/backend/tsconfig.test.json && node --test packages/plugin-contracts/test/parse-plugin-contract.test.mjs apps/shell/test/plugin-loader-parity.test.mjs apps/shell/test/plugin-registry-parity.test.mjs apps/shell/test/plugin-capability-registry.test.mjs apps/shell/test/integration-hardening.test.mjs apps/shell/test/part-module-host.test.mjs apps/shell/test/intent-activation-boundary.test.mjs apps/shell/src/action-runtime.integration.test.mjs apps/shell/dist-test/src/context-state.spec.js apps/shell/dist-test/src/window-bridge.spec.js apps/backend/test/local-ui-plugin-discovery.test.mjs apps/backend/test/tenant-manifest-overrides.test.mjs apps/backend/test/dev-cli-options.test.mjs
scripts.dev:plugin:all: npx concurrently -n starter,sample,unplanned,vessel -c magenta,cyan,yellow,green "npm run dev:plugin" "npm run dev:plugin-sample" "npm run dev:plugin-unplanned-orders" "npm run dev:plugin-vessel-view"
